rag_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees inside annex agree {** ... **}; blocks at the component type level when bounds or relations are explicitly provided.
Use only visible feature names and provided thresholds in AGREE expressions.
generic_rules: Assumptions should encode input constraints; guarantees should encode output validity conditions.
Define helper boolean equations to encapsulate range checks or logical conditions for clarity and reuse.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use 'eq name : bool = expression;' to declare reusable boolean conditions within annex agree.
Ensure all identifiers in expressions are visible at the component type level.
anti_patterns: Avoid embedding implementation-level assignments or non-visible symbols in type-level annex agree blocks.
Do not use implicit type conversions; explicitly match expression types (bool, int, real) in helper declarations.
irrelevant_topics: assign, validator, repair, fusion, assume/guarantee placement strategy, traceability, model alignment
